ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
title: Valid name and primary phone updates customer profile successfully
classification_rationale: This test validates the successful update of mandatory fields.
preconditions: User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the name field.
Enter '+1-555-0100' in the primary phone field.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Customer profile is updated successfully. HTTP 200 is returned.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage

ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
title: Blank name field returns inline validation error on Save
classification_rationale: This test checks the validation for a blank name field.
preconditions: User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.

steps: Enter '' in the name field.
Enter '+1-555-0100' in the primary phone field.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Name is required.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Designed to catch failures or misbehavior

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: User successfully updates customer profile with unique email via UI
classification_rationale: Validates the successful update of a customer profile with a unique email.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists with email: unique@example.com.
steps: Navigate to the Customer Profile page.
Enter new email address 'new_unique@example.com'.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Customer profile is updated successfully. Email is now 'new_unique@example.com'.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage
